Title: A Place to Return
Colors: coastal neutrals, soft blue, sunwashed wood, warm white
Content Linked: A Place to Return — IG Post 01 (https://www.notion.so/A-Place-to-Return-IG-Post-01-8cf0f2f03c1e4553aeb1b64a5b898abe?pvs=21)
Description: A quiet coastal moment featuring a sunlit dock, a resting rowboat, and a cottage overlooking the water. The composition captures stillness, light, and the familiar rhythm of the sea.
Story: A Place to Return reflects the nostalgia and serenity of Maine’s shoreline — where cottages hold memory, light, and salt air in every board. This piece invites a sense of stillness and familiarity, capturing the quiet rhythm of a summer afternoon by the water.
